message:
refactor(cx): move current context methods to FullCx impl block

Relocate current() and set_current() methods from the generic Cx<Caps>
impl block to the FullCx impl block where they more logically belong:

- current() returns Option<FullCx> directly
- set_current() operates on Option<FullCx>

These methods don't depend on the Caps type parameter, so placing them
on FullCx directly is more semantically correct and reduces confusion
about which context type to use when accessing the current task context.

The functionality remains identical - only the location of the impl
block changed from Cx<Caps> to FullCx.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
